name: French Silk Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the powdered sugar, margarine, melted chocolate, and vanilla in a small mixer bowl on low speed.
2. Gradually add milk while beating until smooth and fluffy.
3. Frost 2 nine-inch layers or 3 eight-inch layers.
NOTE: One bar (4 ounces) of sweet cooking chocolate, melted and cooled, can be substituted for the unsweetened chocolate.
